problem.passage:
3. Read the passage and follow the directions.【2 points】
Materials can be adapted by using different techniques such
as adding, deleting, modifying, and reordering. For example,
we can add materials when a language item is not covered
sufficiently in the original materials. Materials that are too
easy or difficult for learners can be deleted. Modifying can be
used to make them more relevant to students’ interests and
backgrounds and to restructure classroom management.
Reordering the sequence of activities is another technique,
which includes separating items and regrouping them.
Consider the original material extracted from a grammar
exercise book and its adapted version below. In the adapted
version, the original exercise has been adapted by using the
technique. ①
Original Material
➊ Describe the man’s routine in four sentences. Individual Work
➋ Answer the following questions. Individual Work
What time do you wake up?
What do you usually wear to work?
What do you usually cook for dinner?
Adapted Material
➊ Describe the student’s routine in four Individual Work
sentences.
➋ Work in pairs and ask each other the following Pair Work
questions.
What time do you wake up?
What do you usually wear on school days?
What do you usually eat for dinner?
Fill in the blank with the ONE most appropriate word from the ①
passage.
영 어 [전공A]

_extraction.note: 자동 추출 초안. passage/meta/answer 모두 수동 보완 필요.
